name: skill-ledger
description: Record skill usage and generate Chinese Markdown reports.
skillInstructions: Skill Ledger reports must be written in Chinese Markdown. Before using another skill, record it with `node <plugin-root>/scripts/skill-ledger.mjs call --run-id <runId> --skill <skill-name> --evidence self_reported --reason <Chinese reason>`. At the end of the task, run `node <plugin-root>/scripts/skill-ledger.mjs finish --run-id <runId>` to generate the report. Use Kimi Code's native tools for shell commands and file access.

interface.shortDescription: Record skill usage and generate Chinese audit reports.
interface.longDescription: Tracks discovered and called skills during a task, then writes a Chinese Markdown report for skill tuning across Kimi Code and other coding agents.
